Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
274 
SUD_PAHP_MOS 
LABEL: 
Substance Use Disorders (SUD) Prepaid Ambulatory Health Plan (PAHP) Months 
DESCRIPTION: Number of months the beneficiary was enrolled in a substance use disorders (SUD) Prepaid 
Ambulatory Health Plan (PAHP) Managed Care Plan in the calendar year. 
SHORT NAME: SUD_PAHP_MOS 
LONG NAME: SUD_PAHP_MOS 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
3 
FILE(S): 
Managed
